cards.text: Office real-estate costs fell 40% after the company went remote-first.

cards.text: Median code-review turnaround grew from 4 hours to 11 hours.

cards.text: Engineer-reported focus time rose to 3.2 deep-work hours per day.

cards.text: Two of nine teams missed their quarterly OKRs, both newly formed.

cards.text: Adopt a hybrid 3-day-anchor schedule to protect review latency.
